vulnerabilities.title: Malfunctioning @nonreentrant lock (Vyper <0.3.10)
vulnerabilities.description: Incorrect storage slot allocation for @nonreentrant locks allowed reentrancy in certain multi-function scenarios.

vulnerabilities.title: Storage corruption with dynamic arrays in mappings (Vyper <0.3.8)
vulnerabilities.description: Dynamic arrays used as mapping values could lead to storage corruption due to incorrect offset calculations.

vulnerabilities.title: Incomplete integer overflow protection (Vyper <0.4.0)
vulnerabilities.description: Vyper versions before 0.4.0 do not have built-in overflow protection for all integer arithmetic operations.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Upgrade to Vyper >=0.4.0 for native overflow checks.
